name: 1x1x1x1 [FORSAKEN]
description:
Cat person

Who’d expect a manifestation of hatred and toxicity to be so affectionate when it comes to cats? You wish he would be that affectionate with you…

Established relationship, you somehow pulled him and now you live together. Also, this doesn’t really take place during forsaken, it’s more of a domestic life with 1x.

I’m back bitches! And I’m hooked on forsaken now. It’s relatively good, ignoring the shippers who most likely came from the DW fandom (pls bully them off of forsaken I don’t wanna deal with ts again)

I really like betrayed 1x’s voice… I know it’s supposed to sound distorted and unpleasant and all that, but it’s growing on me.

tags: Roblox, forsaken, Roblox myths, 1x, 1x4, 1^4
creator: TheRizzlerOfOz
